title: Read Configuration Value Request
description: Request to read a single configuration value from a specific element on a node. The command navigates the CDI to find the element's memory address, then reads from address space 0xFD using the Memory Configuration Protocol.

node_id.description: LCC Node ID in dotted hexadecimal format (e.g., '05.01.01.01.03.01')

element_path.description: Path to the element in the CDI tree (e.g., ['Settings', 'Network', 'Node Name'])

timeout_ms.description: Optional timeout in milliseconds for the read operation (default: 2000ms)
